meta.homeTitle: Apartment with Parking in Seville Old Town | House Sevillana
meta.homeDescription: Restored 290 sqm townhouse with 6 bedrooms, private parking and terrace in Seville's historic center. Perfect for families and large groups. Book direct, no fees.
meta.ogAlt: Inner patio of House Sevillana in Seville's historic center

hero.h1: A house with private parking in Seville's old town, made for groups and families
hero.subtitle: Restored 290 sqm townhouse with 6 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms and a terrace. A 10-minute walk from the Cathedral, in a traditional palace house in the historic center.

parking.title: Private parking on site
parking.body: Parking in Seville's old town is a nightmare. Here you have your own spot included — no extra fees, no driving in circles.

capacity.title: 6 bedrooms and 4 bathrooms
capacity.body: Real space for multigenerational families and groups up to 12, with enough bathrooms so no one has to wait in line.

heritage.title: Traditional palace house in the old town
heritage.body: Andalusian patio, original tiling, modern refurbishment. Steps from Plaza San Marcos, in an authentic, quiet area.

direct.title: Book direct, no middlemen
direct.body: Best price guaranteed and direct contact with the owner. No platform fees added on top.

house.title: Inside the house
house.intro: 290 square meters across a restored palace house, with all the hallmarks of Sevillian architecture: inner patio, original tiles, terrace with city views and a garden to unwind in.
amenities: Fully equipped kitchen (oven, microwave, fridge, coffee maker)

location.title: Right in the historic center
location.intro: House Sevillana is on Calle Bustos Tavera, next to Plaza de San Marcos, in the San Julián neighborhood. An authentic, quiet area from which everything important is within walking distance.

pois.name: Church of San Luis de los Franceses

transport.airport: Seville Airport (SVQ): 11 km, ~16 min by car
transport.station: Santa Justa train station: 10 min by car
transport.bus: Plaza Ponce de León bus stop a few minutes' walk away

audience.title: Ideal for
audience.intro: Given its size and layout, House Sevillana works wonderfully for some travelers and is not the best fit for others. Better that you know before booking.

yes.title: Great for
items: Multigenerational families (grandparents, parents and kids together)
Larger groups of friends (8 to 12 people)
Weddings or events where several couples travel together
Travelers arriving by car who need parking in the city center

no.title: Not the best choice if
items: You're traveling as a couple (way too much space)
You're looking for parties or stag/hen dos (not allowed)
You need a hotel with 24h reception

directBooking.title: Why book here and not on Booking or Airbnb?
directBooking.body: Booking directly on housesevillana.vercel.app guarantees the best available price. Platforms like Booking add nearly a 20% commission, which is passed on to what you pay. Here there are no middlemen: same apartment, same service, and direct contact with the owner for any questions before and during your stay.

items.q: Does House Sevillana have private parking?
items.a: Yes. The house has private parking on site, something rare in Seville's old town. The spot is included in the price, with no extra cost or need to look for paid street parking.

items.q: How many people can stay at House Sevillana?
items.a: The house has 6 bedrooms and 4 bathrooms across 290 sqm, with capacity for up to 12 guests. Ideal when several couples or several generations travel together.

items.q: How far is the Cathedral of Seville?
items.a: The Cathedral and Giralda are about a 10-minute walk from House Sevillana. The Real Alcázar is roughly a 20-minute walk. All the main landmarks of the old town are reachable on foot.
Children of all ages are welcome — the layout makes the house especially comfortable for families. For pets, please ask before booking.

items.q: Are stag/hen parties or events allowed?
items.a: No. Out of respect for the neighbors and the house itself, parties and similar events are not permitted. Quiet hours run from 9 PM to 9 AM.

items.q: What are check-in and check-out times?
items.a: Check-in from 4 PM and check-out by 11 AM. If you need different times, get in touch before booking and we'll see what we can do.

footer.tagline: Restored palace house with private parking in Seville's historic center.
